paragraphs: Mingle with Shingles, call us today!

Your premier choice for commercial and residential roofing services in Stephenville and the surrounding areas. Our team of expert roofing professionals is dedicated to delivering top-quality craftsmanship and timely completion of every project. With Heritage Roofing, you can trust that your roofing needs are in capable hands. Whether you require repair, installation, or maintenance services for your commercial or residential property, we have the knowledge and skill to get the job done right the first time. As a trusted roofing repair company, we pride ourselves on providing dependable solutions for every customer.

From new construction installations to repairs and maintenance, Heritage Roofing specializes in commercial roofing solutions tailored to meet your specific needs. Our experienced team ensures quality workmanship on every project

Protect your home with Heritage Roofing’s comprehensive residential roofing services. From shingle installations to wood shingle repairs, our qualified installers prioritize the integrity and longevity of your roof.

Trust Heritage Roofing to handle all your roof repair and maintenance needs. Whether it’s fixing leaks, addressing poor workmanship, or repairing curled shingles, our team is equipped to provide efficient and effective solutions.

Enhance your home’s comfort and energy efficiency with skylight installations and attic ventilation services from Heritage Roofing. We prioritize proper ventilation and leak repair to ensure a clean and safe living environment.

Has your roof been damaged by hail? Heritage Roofing is here to help. Our expert contractors specialize in hail damage repair, offering prompt and reliable service to restore the integrity of your roof.

designPreferences.desiredFeel:
Heritage Roofing, Inc.
www.heritageroofingtexas.com
1590 N Bates Street Stephenville, TX 76401
Stephenville: 254-968-7663
Granbury: 817-573-0890
Brownwood: 325-510-5768
NO CONTACT FORMS
Monday-Friday: 8am-5pm
Emergency Repairs Available 7 days a week
It should feel solid, local, proven, and responsive under pressure. Not playful, not corporate fluff, not “marketing agency contractor template” — it should feel like the company that shows up after hail, finds the problem fast, explains the fix clearly, and stands behind the work.
recommended page list
Build a real page system: Home, About, Contact, Reviews, Gallery/Projects, Financing or Payment Options if available, FAQ, Blog, and core service pages for Residential Roofing, Commercial Roofing, Roof Repair, Roof Replacement, Storm/Hail Damage, Roof Inspections, Skylights/Ventilation, and Emergency Repairs. Then pair that with tightly written city pages for the highest-value markets like Stephenville, Granbury, Brownwood, Hico, Dublin, Glen Rose, and Weatherford, each with unique local copy and internal links to the relevant services.

recommended homepage sections
Use this homepage stack: 1) trust-first hero with exact service area and offer, 2) service selector, 3) proof strip with reviews/certifications/warranty/years if valid, 4) storm damage and repair urgency block, 5) residential/commercial split, 6) project/results gallery, 7) service-area coverage map/list, 8) process section, 9) FAQs, 10) final conversion section with call, form, and emergency option. Right now the site has fragments of this, but not a disciplined sequence.
designPreferences.desiredFeatures:
Must-haves: sticky mobile call button, click-to-call in header and footer, review embeds or controlled review excerpts, project gallery, structured service pages, unique location pages, LocalBusiness schema, and crawl/index controls including sitemap, canonical consistency, and Search Console monitoring. Add llms.txt only as a supporting clarity layer for AI-readability, not as a substitute for clean page structure, descriptive headings, and readable service/location content.

should-have features
Should-haves: storm-claim guidance, warranty explainer, before/after sliders, material/system comparison content, team or leadership photos, and a “recent jobs near you” module. Also add directory trust presentation with linked BBB, Google Business Profile, and other authoritative profiles displayed as validation, not random logo clutter.
